about.title: About openDesk Edu
about.description: openDesk Edu brings together openDesk CE and 15 education services for seamless digital transformation in higher education.
about.contactDescription: Interested in deploying openDesk Edu at your university?

serviceLearning.title: Learning Management
serviceLearning.description: Moodle and ILIAS — integrated with your campus SSO and data systems for seamless teaching workflows.

serviceCloud.title: Cloud Infrastructure
serviceCloud.description: Scalable container-based deployment on university cloud infrastructure with automated updates and monitoring.

serviceSovereignty.title: Digital Sovereignty
serviceSovereignty.description: Full data residency in your jurisdiction. GDPR-compliant by design with transparent data handling.

serviceSso.title: SSO & Federation
serviceSso.description: SAML-based single sign-on integration with existing university identity providers and research federations.

hero.subtitle: Educational Digital Infrastructure
hero.description: openDesk CE with 15 integrated services for seamless digital transformation in higher education.

imprint.title: Imprint
imprint.contentResponsibilityText: The content of this website has been created with the greatest care. However, we cannot guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or timeliness of the content. As a service provider, we are responsible for our own content on these pages in accordance with § 7 para. 1 TMG under the general laws. According to §§ 8 to 10 TMG, however, we are not obligated as a service provider to monitor transmitted or stored third-party information or to investigate circumstances that indicate illegal activity.
imprint.referencesAndLinksText: Our offer contains links to external third-party websites, the content of which we have no influence over. Therefore, we cannot assume any liability for these external contents. The respective provider or operator of the pages is always responsible for the content of the linked pages.
imprint.copyrightText: The content and works created by the site operators on these pages are subject to German copyright law. Duplication, processing, distribution, and any form of commercialization of such material beyond the scope of the copyright law shall require the prior written consent of its respective author or creator.
imprint.warrantyText: This website and its content are provided "as is" without any warranty, either express or implied. We do not warrant that the information on this website is complete, accurate, or up-to-date.
imprint.privacyTextAfter: for information on how we handle your personal data.
imprint.disputeResolutionText: The European Commission provides a platform for online dispute resolution (ODR):
imprint.disputeResolutionAfter: We are neither willing nor obliged to participate in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration board.

home.getInTouchDescription: Interested in deploying openDesk Edu at your university? We'd love to hear from you.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.generalInfoP1: We take the protection of your personal data very seriously. We treat your personal data confidentially and in accordance with the statutory data protection regulations and this privacy policy.
privacy.generalInfoP2: When you use this website, various personal data are collected. Personal data is any data with which you could be personally identified.
privacy.analyticsCookiesP1: This website uses privacy-friendly analytics only. No cookies are set by default. If you give your consent, we use the following services:
privacy.plausibleItem: Plausible Analytics — a cookie-free, open-source, and privacy-friendly analytics tool. Data is processed on our behalf by Plausible Labs OÜ (Estonia). No personal data is collected; all data is aggregated and anonymous. For more information, see plausible.io/privacy-focused-web-analytics.
privacy.clarityItem: Microsoft Clarity — a session recording and heatmap tool. Clarity may collect device information, usage patterns, and page interaction data. Data is processed by Microsoft Corporation (USA). For more information, see clarity.microsoft.com/privacy.
privacy.analyticsConsentP: You can withdraw your consent at any time by clearing your browser's local storage or using the cookie consent banner at the bottom of each page.
privacy.serverLogsP1: The website hosting provider automatically collects and stores information in server log files, which your browser automatically transmits to us. These are:
privacy.serverLogsP2: These data are not combined with other data sources. The basis for data processing is Art. 6 (1) (f) GDPR.
privacy.contactSectionP: If you contact us via e-mail, your data from the e-mail (sender, recipients, date, subject, content) will be stored for the purpose of processing your inquiry. We do not pass on this data without your consent. The processing of the data sent to us is carried out on the basis of Art. 6 (1) (b) GDPR.
privacy.sslP: This site uses SSL/TLS encryption for security reasons and to protect the transmission of confidential content. You can recognize an encrypted connection by the "https://" in the address line of your browser and the lock symbol.
privacy.cookiesP: Our website does not set any cookies by default. Analytics scripts are only loaded after you explicitly consent via the cookie consent banner. If you accept analytics, the services listed in section 2.1 may set their own cookies as described in their respective privacy policies.
privacy.externalLinksP: Our website contains links to external websites. We have no influence on the content and privacy practices of those sites. We recommend reading the privacy policies of the linked websites.
privacy.yourRightsP: You have the right at any time to receive information about your stored personal data, its origin and recipients, and the purpose of data processing. You also have a right to correct, block, or delete this data. For this purpose, as well as for questions about personal data, you can contact us at any time at <email>info@opendesk-edu.org</email>.
privacy.contactP: If you have any questions about this privacy policy, please contact us:
